violations.description: Heading hierarchy skips from <h1> directly to <h4>. Headings should follow a logical sequence (h1 → h2 → h3) to provide proper document structure for screen readers and assistive technology.

page_description: A health and wellness blog post about sleep tips. The article uses h1 for the title and then jumps to h4 for subsections, skipping h2 and h3 heading levels.
